sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115105" key="xu/mwsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χῡ´μ-ωσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, a stage of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πέψις,</foreign> almost <sense id="n115105.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">χύλωσις, ἀποτυχία χυλοποιήσεως καὶ χυμώσεως καὶ τῆς τέψεως</ref> </xr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0724.tlg002:1:154D" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Steph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Hp.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.154D.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
